title: rubus × piletosus
intro: Rubus × piletosus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or black raspberry hybrid, is a rare and genetically unique plant that is a cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus occidentalis. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. The health benefits of Rubus × piletosus include potential anti-cancer properties, improved cardiovascular health, and anti-aging effects. Rubus × piletosus can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
